docs: PumpFun transfers claimed SOL directly to this account (account[0] in the CPI).
accounts.name: sa_authority

docs: Holds native SOL accumulated as cashback; emptied by PumpFun during claim.
accounts.name: user_volume_accumulator

docs: after PumpFun deposits it there.
accounts.name: receiver

docs: PumpSwap requires account[5] to be a token account owned by authority_pda
(same owner as user_volume_accumulator). WSOL is deposited here by PumpSwap,
then forwarded to receiver_wsol_ata via a second SPL transfer.
accounts.name: sa_wsol_ata

docs: SPL / Token-2022 token account to snapshot.
accounts.name: token_account

docs: Used to support commission distribution between parent and child nodes in TOB business
instructions.name: swap_tob_v2

docs: Optional SOL receiver account
- None: normal swap or SOL stays with payer
- Some: SOL receiver when converting wSOL -> SOL
accounts.name: sol_receiver

docs: Optional SOL receiver account
- None: normal swap or SOL stays with payer
- Some: SOL receiver when converting wSOL -> SOL
accounts.name: sol_receiver

docs: Used to support commission distribution between parent and child nodes in TOC business
instructions.name: swap_toc_v2

docs: Used for signing fee transfers from authority_pda (SOL) or wsol_sa (WSOL)
accounts.name: authority_pda

docs: This is the authority_pda's associated token account for WSOL
accounts.name: wsol_sa

docs: Used for signing fee transfers from authority_pda (SOL) or wsol_sa (WSOL)
accounts.name: authority_pda

docs: This is the authority_pda's associated token account for WSOL
accounts.name: wsol_sa

docs: - Wrap: WSOL token account (ATA) to receive WSOL
- Unwrap: System account (EOA) to receive SOL
accounts.name: receiver

docs: Wrap/Unwrap with optional specified receiver
- Wrap (SOL -> WSOL): receiver is WSOL token account (ATA)
- Unwrap (WSOL -> SOL): receiver is system account (EOA)
Transfer amount:
- From fee: amount_in
- To fee: amount_in - fees
instructions.name: wrap_unwrap_with_receiver

docs: Swap args for token-ledger swaps: no `amount_in` parameter.
`amount_in` is derived on-chain from `token_ledger` delta.
types.name: SwapArgsTokenLedger

docs: Token ledger PDA used to snapshot a token account balance within a transaction.
Seeds: `[b"token_ledger", [index]]`, where `index = 0..=255` (u8).
types.name: TokenLedger
